portfolio_rationale: LLY leads with the strongest fundamental case in the universe (54% revenue growth, 83% gross margin, 94% ROE, no bearish fundamental factors) and is the only stock with a 0.9 fundamental confidence score. XOM is differentiated by being the only ticker with a clean bullish technical signal across all six momentum indicators plus the strongest news sentiment. GOOGL and AMZN receive smaller allocations as solid but less differentiated bullish cases. AAPL is excluded due to weak near-term technicals and negative momentum, while BRK.B is excluded because the technical analyst independently rated it bearish with 0.8 confidence.

LLY.reason: Uniquely superior fundamentals with 54% revenue growth, 83% gross margin, 94% ROE, and no bearish fundamental factors — the strongest fundamental case in the universe by a wide margin.

XOM.reason: Only ticker with a clean bullish technical signal across all six momentum indicators, combined with the highest news sentiment score (1.0 combined, +59% WoW search interest), providing strong near-term momentum confirmation.

GOOGL.reason: Strong balance sheet (ROE 36%, current ratio 1.75, minimal debt), price above both MAs, and the fewest risk flags among the tech names make this a high-quality bullish position.

AMZN.reason: Solid fundamentals and positive 5d/20d price momentum support the bull case, though the 20-day below 50-day MA and quick liquidity risk warrant a smaller allocation relative to GOOGL.

AAPL.reason: Excluded due to price below 20-day MA, RSI near 36, negative 20-day return momentum, and liquidity risk flags that give the bear case meaningful near-term support.

BRK.B.reason: Excluded because the technical analyst independently issued a bearish signal with 0.8 confidence, with negative momentum across 5-day and 20-day returns and sparse fundamental data.
